zh.Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania,: 義大利坎帕尼亞卡塞塔瑟薩 奧盧卡勞倫號
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sueva Orsini於1360年出生在義大利卡拉布里亞科森扎時，她的父親Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola29歲，母親Jeanne de Sabran38歲。她於1381年12月8日與Francis De Baux結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在義大利享年70歲，埋葬在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞桑也阿格斯迪諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sueva Orsini于1360年出生在意大利卡拉布里亞科森扎时，她的父亲Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola29岁，母亲Jeanne de Sabran38岁。她于1381年12月8日与Francis De Baux结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在意大利享年70岁，埋葬在意大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞桑也阿格斯迪諾。

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Sueva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Mario, Genaro, Miguel, Alfredo, Blanca, Esteban, Javier, Jesus, Ricardo.
Spanish: topographic name for someone who lived by a cave, cueva, or a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. Compare De la Cueva .

variants.name: Cuevas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Raul, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Ruben, Fernando.
Spanish: topographic name from the plural of cueva ‘cave’ (see Cueva ), or a habitational name from any of numerous places called (Las) Cuevas. Compare Cuebas and Quave .
History: Juan Jose de Cuevas from Algamitas in Seville married Marie-Helene Ladner on Cat Island, MS, c. 1794. Their surname was altered to Quave in the early 1800s.

variants.name: De la Cueva
meanings: Spanish: variant, with the preposition de and definite article la ‘from the’, of Cueva ‘cave’.

variants.name: Cova
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Tōfa, a short form of Þorfríðr ( see Turid ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sueva Orsini was born in 1360, in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy, her father, Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola, was 29 and her mother, Jeanne de Sabran, was 38. She married Francis De Baux on 8 December 1381. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in Italy, at the age of 70, and was buried in Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy.

fr.Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania,: Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sueva Orsini est née en 1360, à Cosenza, Calabria, Italie, son père, Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Sabran, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Francis De Baux le 8 décembre 1381. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Italie, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie.

de.Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania,: Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Sueva Orsini 1360 in Cosenza, Calabria, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola 29 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Sabran 38. Sie hat am 8. Dezember 1381 Francis De Baux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Italien und wurde in Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sueva Orsini è nata il nel 1360 nel Cosenza, Calabria, Italia, sua padre, Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Sabran, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Francis De Baux il 8 dicembre 1381. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, nel Italia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sueva Orsiniが1360年にイタリアカラブリアコセンザで生まれた時，父Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nolaは29歳，母Jeanne de Sabranは38歳であった。1381年12月8日にFrancis De Bauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイタリアで70歳で死去し，イタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアサント'アゴスティノにて埋葬された。

ko.Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania,: 이탈리아 캠파니아 카세르타 세사 오런카 로로
ko.lifeSummary: Sueva Orsini(이)가 1360년 이탈리아 캘라브리아 코센자에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Sabran(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1381년 12월 8일 Francis De Baux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 이탈리아에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아 산트'아고스틴오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sueva Orsini nasceu em 1360, em Cosenza, Calabria, Itália, seu pai, Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Sabran, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis De Baux em 8 de dezembro de 1381. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Itália, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália.

ru.Lauro, Sessa Aurunca, Caserta, Campania,: лоуро, сесса аурунка, кеисирта, кампаня, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sueva Orsini родилась в 1360 г. в местности косенза, калабря, Италия, её отцу по имени Niccolò Orsini Conte di Nola было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Sabran, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis De Baux 8 декабря 1381 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности Италия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности сант'агостино, андря, бари, пугля, Италия.

Se casó con Francis De Baux el 8 de diciembre de 1381. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1430, en Italia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.
